questionHtml:
Which ions are present in an aqueous solution of Na2CO3?

I.   HCO3−
II.  OH−
III. CO32−


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which ions are present in an aqueous solution of Na2CO3? I. HCO3−II. OH−III. CO32− A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
